name: cpas-sandbox
description: CPAS Sandbox Debate System (Cowork_CPAS) — 2-session 16-turn architecture. v0.9.9: Asymmetric tag system (Advocate R/19, Skeptic C/19), Skeptic A rebuttal-calibrated anchors, D-temperature 1-13 standardization (ascending 1~5/3~9/7~13, descending 9~13/5~11/1~7), D-Q offensive pursuit phase. Session 1 (Exploratory 8T) + Session 2 (Offensive 8T) with Final Statements. Dynamic Data Filters. Observer reserved for CPAS ideal/Claude Code. Log management via cpas-manager plugin.
